title: Doublet

mood.label: Heavy going 🌧️
mood.summary: A grim day defined by disaster on two continents — a rare back-to-back earthquake 'doublet' devastating northern Venezuela and an intensifying European heat dome — only partly offset by cheaper energy, a holding Iran ceasefire and a string of real public-health wins.

style.genre: darkwave drum-and-bass — a TR-909-led broken pulse driving under a tremolo electric-guitar topline that circles a lowered-second figure, with a deep sine sub-bass, low bowed-string drone and tape-echo guitar stabs; D phrygian's flat second leaning the whole thing toward dread without collapsing — fast feet under a heavy heart

pattern: stack( s("bd ~ ~ bd ~ ~ bd ~, ~ ~ sd ~ ~ ~ sd ~, hh*8").bank("RolandTR909").gain("1 0.5 0.6 0.9 0.5 0.5 0.85 0.5").hpf(120).room(0.15), s("~ ~ rim ~ ~ rim ~ ~").bank("RolandTR909").gain(0.4).pan(0.65).delay(0.3).delaytime(0.2).speed(1.2), note("d2 ~ d2 ~ bb1 ~ a1 ~").s("sine").lpf(420).gain(0.62).attack(0.005).release(0.18), note("<[d3,f3,a3] [eb3,g3,bb3] [d3,f3,a3] [a2,c3,eb3]>").s("gm_acoustic_guitar_nylon").attack(0.01).release(0.5).lpf(sine.range(700,1900).slow(12)).gain(0.34).room(0.4).delay(0.25).delaytime(0.27).pan(0.4), note("d4 ~ eb4 d4 ~ a3 ~ f4 ~ g4 a4 ~ f4 eb4 d4 ~").s("gm_electric_guitar_clean").lpf(2600).gain(0.4).off(0.125, x => x.gain(0.18).pan(0.7)).delay(0.35).delaytime(0.33).room(0.3), note("<d2 a1>").s("sawtooth").lpf(500).gain(0.22).attack(1.5).release(3).room(0.5).slow(2) )

lines: Two shocks in one breath, the ground couldn't choose —
San Felipe, then Yumare, the worst since nineteen-hundred news.
Two hundred and counting, four thousand under the dust,
and a model that whispers it could climb into the thousands if it must.
Across an ocean the heat won't break, it only slides east,
forty-one in Germany, the omega block won't release.
Ebola climbs in the Congo, Darfur crosses the line —
so much weight on a single day, so little room to be fine.
Heavy going, heavy going, the ledger still keeps some light —
crude gone quiet, the ceasefire holds, the vaccines winning the fight.
Zero deaths in the young, the EVs out front, the smoke half gone from the air —
but a doublet shook the earth today, and grief takes more than its share.
